_note: PokeMMO ball multipliers. Flat balls carry a fixed 'rate'; conditional balls carry a 'rule' name resolved by catch_calc.ball_multiplier against a BattleContext. Formulas verified against the PokeMMO-specific catch calculator (c4vv/CatchCalc, pokeballs.js); see docs/hub_validation.md. Luxury corrected to 1.0 (Hub had 2.0; Luxury affects friendship, not catch rate). Repeat's exact rule is unconfirmed (the calc uses a chain count) so it stays 1.0 until verified in-game.
